stories.title: Most likely picks for every NBA lottery team
stories.summary: We have the odds, likely picks and best fits for prospects ahead of Sunday's NBA draft lottery.

stories.title: Sources: Rodgers likely to play for Steelers in '2...
stories.summary: Quarterback Aaron Rodgers is expected to visit the Steelers this weekend and is likely to play for them this season, sources told NFL Network's Ian Rapoport on Thursday.

stories.title: Family sighs: Boyd, hurt with kids, has surgery
stories.summary: Matthew Boyd underwent successful surgery on his left meniscus -- an injury suffered while playing with his kids -- and is set to miss at least a month, according to general manager Carter Hawkins.

stories.title: FSU, Georgia cancel series due to league skeds
stories.summary: Florida State and Georgia mutually agreed to cancel their home-and-home series set for 2027 and 2028 but are working on scheduling a neutral-site matchup.

stories.title: Makar, Dahlin, Werenski finalists for Norris Troph...
stories.summary: Colorado's Cale Makar, Buffalo's Rasmus Dahlin and Columbus blueliner Zach Werenski are all finalists for the Norris Trophy, awarded each year to the NHL's top defenseman.
